title: Cargo Check
description: Learn to use the println! macro to output simple text through the standard output.
problemStatement:
Rust loves safety! Use `println!` to display the phrase `"Rust is safe and fast."` to the standard output.

**Requirement:** Ensure you include the semicolon `;` at the end of your statement.
hints: Macros are a powerful feature in Rust for metaprogramming.
